resources.string: Slack is blocked until %1$s.\n\nThere is no off-switch. Wait, or uninstall this app.
Tap the button to block Slack until the next 6 am.
Tap the button — you\'ll be asked to grant Accessibility permission first.
No way to undo this from inside the app. Uninstall to unblock early.

Slack Nuke needs Accessibility permission to detect when Slack opens and close it. 

In the next screen, find "Slack Nuke" and toggle it on. 

If the toggle is greyed out (Android 13+), go back to App info, tap the ⋮ menu in the top-right and choose "Allow restricted settings" first.
Detects when Slack is opened during a block window and sends you back to the home screen. Does not collect, store, or transmit any data.
